---
title: "News"
---

<p class="page-subtitle">
Updates on my research, publication highlights, conferences, seminars, and related activities.
</p>

<div class="news-list">

<article class="news-item">
  <time class="news-date" datetime="2026-06-24">24 June 2026</time>

  <h2 class="news-title">
    New preprint: <em>Connecting Quantum Tomography and Quantum Retrodiction</em>
  </h2>

  <p>
    See my related <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/sebastianmurk_quantumphysics-quantuminformation-ugcPost-7475445102635655170-Ql_Q/">LinkedIn post</a> for more detail.
  </p>

  <figure class="news-image">
    <img
      src="/assets/news_images/2606.23777abstract.png"
      alt="Abstract of the preprint Connecting Quantum Tomography and Quantum Retrodiction"
      loading="lazy">
  </figure>

  <p class="news-links">
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23777">arXiv:2606.23777</a>
    <span aria-hidden="true">·</span>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/posts/sebastianmurk_quantumphysics-quantuminformation-ugcPost-7475445102635655170-Ql_Q/">LinkedIn post</a>
  </p>
</article>

<article class="news-item">
  <time class="news-date" datetime="2026-06-12">12 June 2026</time>

  <h2 class="news-title">
    RQI Circuit talk now live on YouTube
  </h2>

  <p>
    My talk <em>&ldquo;Classical-quantum gravity as quantum gravity in disguise&rdquo;</em>, given as part of the RQI Circuit, is now live on YouTube.
  </p>

  <a class="video-preview" href="https://www.youtube.com/live/1rpHu-2qTQU?t=12671s" aria-label="Watch RQI Circuit talk on YouTube">
    <img
      src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/1rpHu-2qTQU/hqdefault.jpg"
      alt="Video thumbnail for RQI Circuit talk Classical-quantum gravity as quantum gravity in disguise"
      loading="lazy">
    <span class="video-play" aria-hidden="true">▶</span>
    <span class="video-label">Watch on YouTube</span>
  </a>

  <p class="news-links">
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/live/1rpHu-2qTQU?t=12671s">YouTube</a>
  </p>
</article>

<article class="news-item">
  <time class="news-date" datetime="2025-11-20">20 November 2025</time>

  <h2 class="news-title">
    Article published in <em>Journal of High Energy Physics</em>
  </h2>

  <p>
    Our article <em>&ldquo;Thermodynamics of regular black holes in anti-de Sitter space&rdquo;</em> <br> is now published in <em>Journal of High Energy Physics</em>.
  </p>

  <figure class="news-image">
    <img
      src="/assets/news_images/JHEP11(2025)121.png"
      alt="First page of the JHEP article Thermodynamics of regular black holes in anti-de Sitter space"
      loading="lazy">
  </figure>

  <p class="news-links">
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.11623">arXiv:2505.11623</a>
    <span aria-hidden="true">·</span>
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/JHEP11(2025)121">J. High Energy Phys. <strong>2025</strong> (11), 121 (2025)</a>
  </p>
</article>

<article class="news-item">
  <time class="news-date" datetime="2025-09-22">22 September 2025</time>

  <h2 class="news-title">
    Article selected as Editor&rsquo;s Pick in <em>International Journal of Modern Physics D</em>
  </h2>

  <p>
    My invited article <em>&ldquo;Nomen non est omen: Why it is too soon to identify ultra-compact objects as black holes&rdquo;</em> was selected as an Editor&rsquo;s Pick by the <em>International Journal of Modern Physics D</em>.
  </p>

  <figure class="news-image">
    <img
      src="/assets/news_images/IJMPD_EditorPick.png"
      alt="Editor&rsquo;s Pick card for Nomen non est omen in International Journal of Modern Physics D"
      loading="lazy">
  </figure>

  <p class="news-links">
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03750">arXiv:2210.03750</a>
    <span aria-hidden="true">·</span>
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1142/S0218271823420129">Int. J. Mod. Phys. D <strong>32</strong> (14), 2342012 (2023)</a>
  </p>
</article>

<article class="news-item">
  <time class="news-date" datetime="2025-09-17">17 September 2025</time>

  <h2 class="news-title">
    Preprint featured in Dr. Blitz&rsquo;s peer-review series
  </h2>

  <p>
    Our preprint <em>&ldquo;Classical-quantum systems breaking conservation laws&rdquo;</em> was featured in Episode #22 of Dr. Blitz&rsquo;s peer-review series. Thank you for the comprehensive walkthrough!
  </p>

  <a class="video-preview" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2mq6KgKvl1I" aria-label="Watch Dr. Blitz peer-review video on YouTube">
    <img
      src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/2mq6KgKvl1I/hqdefault.jpg"
      alt="Video thumbnail for Dr. Blitz peer-review episode on classical-quantum systems breaking conservation laws"
      loading="lazy">
    <span class="video-play" aria-hidden="true">▶</span>
    <span class="video-label">Watch on YouTube</span>
  </a>

  <p class="news-links">
    <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.15291">arXiv:2506.15291</a>
    <span aria-hidden="true">·</span>
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2mq6KgKvl1I">YouTube</a>
  </p>
</article>

</div>
